policy: small-scale runs not packaged as dotgit tarballs per feedback_evidence_packaging_policy_required
git_untracked_files: P*/runtime_repo/ (chaintape L4 + L4.E git repos; CAS uses git as backend; not packaged as dotgit tarballs at this scale)
reproducibility_protocol: re-run handover/tests/scripts/run_tb_18r_r6_evidence.sh against same git HEAD (083b007 baseline) with same MAX_TX=12, per_problem_timeout_s=600, condition=n1, model=deepseek-chat; P02/P03 likely SIGKILL'd at timeout cap (hard problems with >25 cycles); use --per-problem-timeout-s 1800 to avoid SIGKILL + capture PPUT_RESULT for full R4 invariant equation observation.
